dialogos.texto_en: (This is the place she specified.\n Somewhere around here%p-2;――%p;)
(...Found her!)
Who did you come to meet?
You, Ichika.
I really%p-2;――
W-wait a second!
Huh?!\nWhat the, all of a sudden? I haven't even%p-2;――
L-look!\nThere are people watching here, right?!
Come on! Follow me!
Hey! Where're you goin'?!
Just hurry up already!!
Huff... Huff...\nI-I'm tired...\nYou made me sprint almost at full speed...
W-well, so am I!\nWho do you think's to blame?!
Who's to blame... Is it me?
...No, it's not.\nI decided on Kokusai dori, after all.
*sigh*\nThat meeting spot was a failure.
Jeez.\nWe didn't have to come all the way back to the hotel,\ndid we?
...Ah.\nIn a way, this place\nisn't exactly reassuring either, huh?
What's that supposed to mean?
Well, you're not exactly good at going with the flow.
I mean, in your case,\nyou never know who might see you where.
I've learned that well enough in the past few days.\nBeing an actress is tough, huh?
...That's not what I meant.
Huh?
E-even I have had dreams of being confessed \nto by someone in this way!
Except in a more romantic place!\nAt least with just the two of us!
Even if you say that.\nYou were the one who specified that spot,\nweren't you?
...Well, I didn't think you'd actually come.
*sigh*\nYou're one to talk, being as proactive as you were.
You were all energetic and clingy\nat Emerald Beach, right?
Huh?\nDid you actually know it was me back then?
Ah, so it was you, after all.
Wait, were you trying to\nlure me into your trap at that time?\nOr did you just have a hunch?
At that time, I just had a vague feeling.\nSaying something like 'be more honest,'\nI thought that you were playing a trick on me.
I see...
Of course, I wanted you to make a choice.\nBut...
What is it?\nIf there's another reason, just tell me straight.
Ahaha...\nWell, I guess so.
Of course, I wanted you to choose me.\nBut...
What is it?\nIf there's another reason, just tell me straight.
...It's for your sake.
Wait. I don't understand.
I mean, despite your attempts to act cool,\nyou're surprisingly stubborn, you know?
So, by cornering you like this,\nmaybe you'd finally give me an answer.
You...
Look, we didn't want you to keep being indecisive.
So, how about it? Did it work?
…Geez.\nI mean, I get why you take care of your sisters,\nbut why are you trying to take care of me?
Because I'm their big sister.\nIf it helps their feelings come true, then...
(...So that's what it is.)
And I suppose I'm included in with the sisters. \nYou're just too caring as the eldest daughter.
Could it be that you've fallen in love with me again?
Yeah.\nI like you, Ichika.\nNo one else but you.
It's that tenderness you have for your sisters,\nand your determination to be strong\nfor your dreams, and for yourself.
But because of that, \nyou overdo it sometimes \nand push yourself into a corner%p-2;――
And yet I love all of that.
Me too, I love you.
...I finally got to hear it.
Is that so?\n...You happy?
Yeah, I'm happy.
But 'finally?'\nCould it be...?
(Ah...\n I did say 'finally,' didn't I.)
You said everything back then was a lie.\nBut I want there to be some truths among the lies%p-2;――
I might have always thought that somewhere.
I see.
Hey, Futaro-kun.\nI might not really be a kind person.\nIs that okay?
Oh, really?\nThen show me that side of you too.\nYou don't have to hold back.
I'm sure I'll end up\nfalling in love with that side of you too.
Ahh, come on... I can't compete with you.
But that's just how love works, right?\nI feel like I've finally learned that.
...Yeah.
I want to love every part of you,\nand I want you to love every part of me too...
